_comment: Static reference contract specs (multiplier/tick size/initial margin/exchange) for a small seed set of liquid futures contracts. Approximate as of file authoring - for offline sizing math only, NOT a live margin feed. When phase_v2.ib.enabled and IB is reachable, prefer IB's live margin over these static numbers (documented future enhancement, not implemented in this pass) - this file is the offline/backtest/IB-disabled fallback risk/futures_risk.py::load_futures_contract_specs() reads. Initial margins move with exchange SPAN requirements and will drift from these numbers over time; refresh by hand periodically.
